remaining_scope.scope: Table II row-exact optimized gate counts
remaining_scope.reason: The paper does not publish the random seeds, tie-breaking order, or best-of-N selection details needed to replay each reported optimum exactly.
The complete BKA post-processing inputs and reproducible baseline environment are not available in the public case.

compute_assessment.reason: A 1000-attempt-per-row campaign already saturated at 7/26 row-exact g_op matches; additional compute cannot recover unspecified deterministic choices.

difference_reasons_for_figures.fig3_trace: No residual difference: gate count, SWAP count, and depth match the paper example.
difference_reasons_for_figures.reverse_traversal: The generated plot uses QFT-6/8/10 as a mechanism probe rather than the paper's complete benchmark mixture.
difference_reasons_for_figures.decay_tradeoff: The paper does not publish the complete Fig. 9 circuit mixture and execution details, so the generated plot is a local sweep of the same mechanism.
difference_reasons_for_figures.table2: Row-exact values require unpublished random seeds, tie-breaking order, and BKA post-processing inputs; the residual is a metadata boundary, not a compute boundary.
